lineage_statement: Morpheus imports verified operational evidence generated by the Hermes execution layer without rewriting legacy identity history.

import_summary.purpose: Dry-run manifest for the first historical_import agent activation before touching the live registry.
import_summary.scope: Import verifiable legacy Hermes operational evidence into a Morpheus activation baseline while preserving original provenance.

constraints: Do not claim Hermes and Morpheus are identical.
Do not overwrite legacy Hermes records.
Public wording should say "verifiable", not "most trusted".
Do not touch live APIs during this dry run.
